prestazioni: 13B-REW twin-rotor engine: Full sequential twin-turbo upgrade to Garrett GTX3582R Gen II turbos (1.06 A/R turbine housing, 62mm compressor inducer) with TiAL MV-R 44mm wastegates and TiAL Q 50mm blow-off valves, paired with a custom 4-inch stainless steel turbo-back exhaust system featuring a Tomei 80mm titanium exhaust tip and a GReddy Revolution RS 76mm front pipe for optimized spool and reduced backpressure

Engine internals: Racing Beat apex seals (silicon nitride coated), Mazdaspeed 3-port peripheral porting with custom 10.5:1 compression ratio housings, HKS 264°/264° camshafts with adjustable cam gears, and a Tomei Type-1 oil pump for high-RPM reliability, supported by an HKS Racing Suction Relocation Kit and a custom 4-core Koyorad GTX400 front-mount intercooler with 3.5-inch silicone couplers

Drivetrain & handling: OS Giken Super Lock LSD (2-way, 40% preload) with a PPG 6-speed straight-cut dog engagement gearset (1st: 2.97, 2nd: 2.12, 3rd: 1.57, 4th: 1.23, 5th: 1.00, 6th: 0.82), paired with a Tilton 7.25-inch twin-disc carbon clutch and a Cusco Type-RS 2.5-way rear differential mount. Suspension features Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (24-way rebound, 12-way compression damping) with Cusco front and rear sway bars (24mm front, 22mm rear) and Whiteline adjustable end links
estetica: Full Rocket Bunny Version 3 widebody kit (Pandem) with custom carbon fiber overfenders, front canards, and a duckbill rear spoiler, finished in Mazda Racing Silver (34K) with a 3M Matte Black roof wrap and custom gold-pinstripe accents

Custom front bumper lip by Veilside Fortune 03 (carbon fiber) with integrated LED DRLs from Morimoto XB35, paired with a RE Amemiya GT-II rear diffuser and a custom titanium bolt-on rear wing mount system (9 Lives Racing) for adjustable angle settings (0° to 15°)

Interior: Bride Zeta III bucket seats (fixed-back, FIA-approved) with Schroth Profi II 6-point harnesses, a custom half-cage by AutoPower Industries (1.75-inch DOM tubing, TIG-welded) with a bolt-in X-brace, and a custom carbon fiber dashboard overlay by Seibon with a digital gauge cluster featuring an AEM X-Series 30-0300 wideband controller and a Defi BF Advance turbo boost gauge (0-3.5 bar)
